content:
DOCUMENT NOTE: Anything marked with * means it's either mandatory or important; pay attention to that. Any phrase or sentence that has a strikethrough may be disregarded. Main divisions, such as Vermilion Network and Eclipse Seventy-Seventh Regiment, will be included and should not be overlooked. This document was created by The Director with the aid of the Faction Elder.
// SECTION I: INTRODUCTION

Pandora's Acolytes is a Group of Interest that specializes in the theft of classified documents and the capture of anomalies that they know exist. Pandora's Acolytes is also classified as a private military company, despite not receiving many contracts. The Acolytes were founded in 1907, with the main objective of learning and documenting all the information they would be able to steal. As they learn about the target foundation, they will also capture stored anomalies within their facilities. Pandora's Acolytes is also an advanced technology company. They manufacture specialized gear for weaponry, advanced cybernetics, and even larger projects such as the reality anchor, using blueprints stolen from Site-98. This reality anchor is no normal reality anchor such as the one the Foundation uses; the Acolytes are building a skyscraper-sized reality anchor. During a raid they did on Site-98, classified documents about the O5 Council were stolen, where Vermilion Network now keeps the documents extremely safe within their databases. They operate under the Director, a person of interest who is rather odd.

The purpose of this handbook is to inform faction members on the morph locker and custom morphs, and the main purpose of the faction.

// SUBSECTION I.I: HIERARCHY

Pandora's Acolytes personnel are expected to follow Chain of Command strictly, listed here from lowest to highest*. Pandora's Acolytes operate under the Director, Deputy Director and their secretaries. Any recent member that joins Pandora's Acolytes will start as a Low Rank, climbing through the ladder by being active and attending events. "Free" rankups will not be permitted as per request of the Director. Exception being a draft directly to Low Rank. Hierarchy will and may be referred to as "Echelons", below is all of the echelon's structure from Lowest to Highest.

LOW RANKS (LR)

Private (PVT)
Private First Class (PFC)
Specialist (SPC)
Corporal (CPL)

MIDDLE RANKS (MR)

Sergeant (SGT)
Staff Sergeant (SST)
Sergeant First Class (SFC)
Master Sergeant (MSG)

HIGH RANKS (HR)

First Sergeant (1SG)
Sergeant Major (SGM)
Command Sergeant Major (CSM)

DIVISION OVERSEERS (DO)

Co-Division Overseer (DO-C)
Division Overseer (DO)

WARRANT OFFICERS (WO)

WO ranks are received upon passing an application judged by HC+.
Warrant Officer (WO)
First Chief Warrant Officer (1WO)
Second Chief Warrant Officer (2WO)
Third Chief Warrant Officer (3WO)
Fourth Chief Warrant Officer (4WO)
Fifth Command Warrant Officer (5CO)

TRIAL HIGH COMMAND RANKS

Second Lieutenant (2LT)
Lieutenant (LTN)
Major (MAJ)
Captain (CPT)
Lieutenant Colonel (LCL)

HIGH COMMAND RANKS

Colonel (CNL)
Brigadier General (BGN)
Major General (MGN)
Lieutenant General (LGN)
General (GN-1) (the number will be replaced by the number of active generals plus one.)

SECRETARY RANKS

Deputy Director's Secretary (DS-D)
Director's Secretary (DS)

DIRECTOR RANKS

Deputy Director (DD)
Faction Elder
The Director

There are additional ranks within Pandora's Acolytes, including Staff and Developer roles you may take on based on your experience and seniority.

STAFF TEAMServes a more supervisory role, reprimanding breaches of operational conduct made during a deployment or within the faction's Discord channels.
HIGH COMMAND+Are able to strike bad actors within the faction and are also able to hand points to faction members.
DEVELOPERSThe people that are helping build the map for the faction. Once the map is done, this role will stay as a glory role.
// SUBSECTION I.II: DIVISIONS AND SUBDIVISIONS

Pandora's Acolytes has 7 divisions: the Eclipse Seventy-Seventh Regiment, Umbra First Squadron, Azure Third Detachment, Erebus Research, "Lambda" Law Firm, Vermilion Network and Lamina Pandorae. Lamina Pandorae also has 1 subdivision, "Bravo" Company. These divisions have individual objectives, however sometimes share a mutual objective.

ECLIPSE SEVENTY-SEVENTH REGIMENT

The elite combatant division, with some of the most skilled personnel among our ranks. E77 carries out special operations within the sites we operate on, and may also serve as sharpshooters or marksmen.

AZURE THIRD DETACHMENT

Combat medics, who possess specialized medical capabilities alongside firearm proficiency. In combat, A3D is your best friend, and your enemies' greatest foe.

VERMILION NETWORK

Informational entities. Appearing human but taking no physical form, Vermilion acts as a secure vault for everything that you don't want your opposition getting their hands on.

"LAMBDA" LAW FIRM

As the name suggests, Pandora's Acolytes' Law Firm, and also the best in the world. LLF is made up of the best licensed lawyers in the world, capable of winning any case presented to them.

EREBUS RESEARCH

As the name suggests, Pandora's Acolytes' own Scientific Department, made up of the smartest and most insane people ever.

UMBRA FIRST SQUADRON

Provides protection to the civil divisions, preventing hostile forces from harming non-combat and civil units.

LAMINA PANDORAE

A division made up of the most skilled combatants. Pandorae are the division that protects the Direction and hands out KillSquad operations. They are Pandora's Acolytes' most devoted members and trusted by the Directors to guard and defend their lives. The Pandorae have authorisation to go against any personnel that presents a threat to the Acolytes and harmful members within the Foundation too. (Any Pandora's Acolytes personnel that leaks information about Pandora's Acolytes to the Foundation.) OPSEC.

"BRAVO" COMPANY (LP SUBDIVISION)

Composed of the best personnel of Lamina Pandorae. They participate in scrims against other Groups or Factions, representing the best of the Acolytes.

// DIRECTIONAL PROTECTION PRIORITY

The list of divisions/factions that will protect the Direction if Lamina Pandorae isn't available, in order of priority:

1Lamina Pandorae
2"Bravo" Company
3Eclipse Seventy-Seventh Regiment
4Umbra First Squadron
5Azure Third Detachment
6Main Faction
// SECTION II: MORPHS

Our morphs are our image, representing our faction to every other faction as well as other SCPRP parties. You are to follow the morph locker guide made in morph information, request your codename in codename request, and ranks can be requested when earned in rank requests.

For morphs, you already have everything set out, each rank and division having its own set morph. All you need to do is change (username) with your in-game username such as for example "phorgespwn", "onevsman" and so on. Your rank in the rtag isn't needed, now it's only your echelon, clearance, goi position such as "HGOI", "NGOI" or "FOUNDATION". Your ntag is just your chosen codename, like "Mace".

Custom morphs are locked to High Command+*, unless you have an OC, or are in a civil division within the faction. If you wish to have your OC you must post it in the OC storage and apply for the site you want your OC in.

STARTER GEAR

ARX (If you spawn as Chaos Insurgency you must change your weapon from SCAR to ARX.)
Radio (If not given in the loadout of the team.)
Detain (If we have the perk for it on the site.)
Spas (Not allowed if it's blacklisted in the site and if it's a perk you must check if we've applied for it.)

Your loadout will also depend on the division. So pay attention to those details. If you bought the freeze gun gamepass during Christmas, usually in most sites it's blacklisted so make sure to change it. Your maxhealth will change depending on the sites, so make sure to read their faction guidelines. CanRK is a permission usually in the form of a perk that we need to apply for, so make sure we have the perk on the site you're going to deploy on before placing it in a morph request.

// SECTION III: ROLEPLAY CONDUCT

Pandora's Acolytes members are expected to follow rules during roleplay and deployments. If one of these is broken you may be punished for your wrongdoing. Any punishments made outside of the Pandora's Acolytes server, whether it's in Faction Hub, Site, or anywhere else will be transferred to Pandora's Acolytes, like blacklists, strikes and such. If we see you were blacklisted for the wrong or dumb reason, you may take it up to our staff team, or with the faction leader himself.

BEHAVIOURMembers are expected to behave professionally when deploying, whether it's a self-deployment or a deployment hosted by an HR+. If you are seen behaving unprofessionally you are going to be punished for such.
DEPLOYMENT CONDUCTDuring a deployment, members are expected to follow the group and/or squad using the in-game systems. If you wish to wander around, please ask an HR+. The server's communication channels may also be used for easier communication.
SELF-DEPLOYMENT CONDUCTIf you're self-deploying you need to act professionally and not do anything that would get the faction in trouble for your actions.
GRAMMARWhen you're roleplaying you must always use SPaG (Spelling, Punctuation and Grammar) if it's either semi-serious or serious roleplay modes. If it's casual you may goof around.
INFORMATIONAny sensitive information about Pandora's Acolytes leaked in roleplay will cause you to be hunted by our KillSquad, seeing that you've become a liability betraying Pandora's Acolytes' beliefs. If anyone asks you for any sort of information, it's usually restricted to personnel with PHI level clearance. (Check Clearance System for references.)
// SECTION IV: COMMUNICATIONS CONDUCT

When inside our communications, you are expected to follow the rules, otherwise you may be punished for any broken rules.

FREE RANKUPS ARE NOT PERMITTED PER DIRECTOR'S REQUEST. EXCEPTIONS EXIST ONLY FOR DIRECT DRAFTS TO LOW RANK.
